mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE sales_status = 'ON_SALE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE sales_status = 'READY'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partners WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partners WHERE status = 'DELETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND payment_status = 'PAID'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'CANCELED' OR payment_status = 'CANCELED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND payment_status = 'PAID' AND created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'CANCELED' AND created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())

SELECT p.name AS partnerName, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS productCount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity),0) AS orderCount, -- 판매티켓 수 COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) AS salesAmount, -- 매출 COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price) - SUM(pov.base_price * oi.quantity), 0) AS netProfit -- 순이켓
FROM partners p LEFT JOIN products pr ON pr.partner_id = p.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.product_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.order_item_id = oi.id LEFT JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id
WHERE o.status = 'COMPLETED' AND o.payment_status = 'PAID'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY salesAmount DESC

SELECT mc.name AS categoryName, COUNT(p.id) AS productCount
FROM menu_categories mc
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = mc.id
GROUP BY mc.name ORDER BY productCount DESC

SELECT p.name AS productName, SUM(oi.quantity) AS orderCount
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id AND o.status = 'COMPLETED' AND o.payment_status = 'PAID'
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE(o.created_at) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity),0) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) AS salesAmount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price) - SUM(pov.base_price * oi.quantity), 0) AS netProfit
FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.order_item_id = oi.id JOIN product_option_values pov ON pov.id = oio.option_value_id
WHERE o.status = 'COMPLETED' AND o.payment_status = 'PAID'
AND o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
AND o.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())
AND o.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())
GROUP BY DATE(o.created_at) ORDER BY date
